dashboard.about.title: LearnX Intelligence
dashboard.about.description: Precision learning for the next generation of global talent.
dashboard.about.p1: LearnX isn't just another chatbot. While ChatGPT gives you answers, LearnX builds your brain. We've engineered an adaptive ecosystem that transforms static data into interactive mastery.
dashboard.about.features.title: The LearnX Edge:
dashboard.about.features.notes: Deep Notes: We don't just summarize; we architect knowledge with visual prompts and exam-targeted structures.
dashboard.about.features.quizzes: Interactive Logic: Real-time assessments with negative marking and deep reasoning explanations.
dashboard.about.features.chatbot: Expert Personas: Specialized AI cores for coding and general assistance with multimodality.
dashboard.about.features.tools: Universal Toolkit: Integrated scientific computation, world news, and library search in one hub.
dashboard.about.features.college: Curriculum Sync: Direct alignment with university and school board syllabi.
dashboard.about.p2: Built by Team Nexithra for those who demand more from AI. Welcome to the future of education.
dashboard.about.assistantGuide.title: Vocal Interface Guide
dashboard.about.assistantGuide.p1: Command the system using 'Jarvis'. Your voice is the interface.
dashboard.about.assistantGuide.example2: Jarvis, initialize notes on Quantum Theory.
dashboard.terms.title: Protocol & Terms
dashboard.terms.fairUse.title: Integrity Protocol
dashboard.terms.fairUse.desc: LearnX is for personal evolution. Users are expected to maintain academic integrity.
dashboard.terms.accuracy.title: Data Precision
dashboard.terms.accuracy.desc: While our Gemini-powered cores are highly advanced, always verify critical data with primary academic nodes.
dashboard.terms.license.title: Core License
dashboard.terms.license.desc: LearnX Core v1.0. Licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0.
